scenic.text: Marcus walked us through the forest model — could we get the full ground plan to the SMs by Wednesday?

costumes.text: Sofia: measurements scheduled for Saturday — cast received the link.

props.text: Discussed the donkey head — Sofia and Marcus aligning on hand-off.

lighting.text: Riley showed initial sketch for the forest. Strong starting point — director excited.

music.text: Confirmed no live underscoring; sound design will cover atmosphere.

production.text: Fiona was 8 minutes late — traffic; confirmed for next call.
Kira excused (academic conflict); will catch up on read-through notes Friday.

timeBlocks.activity: Block Act 2, Scene 1 — lovers in the woods
Block Act 3, Scene 2 — confusion of the lovers

scenic.text: The downstage-left tree is in the lovers' main path — could we shift it two feet upstage?

costumes.text: Hermia's gown needs to move freely through fight choreography. Sofia attending Friday rehearsal to watch.

props.text: Helena to carry a small lantern in 2.1 — need to confirm practical vs. fake.

lighting.text: Looking for a chase or shimmer effect for fairy interactions in 2.1.

sound.text: Wind-and-leaves bed established for forest scenes — Quinn building.

production.text: Full lover scenes blocked. Director thrilled with the chemistry.

timeBlocks.activity: Block Pyramus and Thisbe rehearsal scene (Act 5)
Run with comedy beats and props

costumes.text: Bottom's donkey head try-on this week — Sofia coordinating with Marcus.

wigsMakeup.text: Discussed makeup approach for Pyramus death scene — keep it broad and comic.

props.text: Need the Wall costume/prop by next Friday — comic timing depends on it.

lighting.text: Theatre-within-the-theatre lighting needs intentional fakeness — discussed.

production.text: Wonderful work tonight — Pyramus rehearsal scene already very funny.

lineNotes.scriptedText: I would my father look'd but with my eyes.
lineNotes.spokenText: I wish my father saw with my eyes.

lineNotes.scriptedText: Helen, to you our minds we will unfold.
lineNotes.comment: Dropped the entire line; jumped to the next.

lineNotes.scriptedText: O hell! to choose love by another's eyes.
lineNotes.spokenText: Oh god — hell! To choose love by another's eyes.

lineNotes.scriptedText: Methought I was, and methought I had —
lineNotes.spokenText: Me thought I was, and me thought I had —

lineNotes.scriptedText: "Whereat with blade, with bloody blameful blade…"
lineNotes.comment: Quince came in late by ~2 seconds. Cue light fired correctly.

props.name: Love-in-idleness flower
props.notes: Small purple flower with concealed pouch for 'juice' effect

props.name: Hermia's letter
props.notes: Period-style scroll; budget for 12 (1 per performance)

props.name: Wooden swords (×2)
props.notes: Soft-tipped; fight choreography approved by Riley

props.name: Fairy lanterns (×6)
props.notes: Battery LED inside; never actual flame on set

props.name: Wall costume/prop
props.notes: Hand-held; chink in the wall (peephole) must be visible from house

props.name: Lion costume hand-prop (mane)
props.notes: Detachable mane Snug can lift in 5.1 — 'my face is my face' joke

props.name: Stage blood (vial)
props.notes: Karo-syrup based; one vial per performance for spillage and timing

notes.text: Bring a pencil and your script.
Lovers off-book for Acts 2 and 3 by Wednesday.
Please come knowing your Act 5 lines off-book.
Water bottles are on the SR props table — refill as needed.
Designer run today — designers in house. Please be on time.
Costume calls at the half — meet Sofia at the dressing rooms.

scheduleItems.description: - Sit out front with the design team

notes.text: v2: Photo call added after the dress run.
Costumes on by 6:30 PM. Hair and makeup, please come ready.
Tomorrow is first preview — get rest tonight.

scheduleItems.description: - Full show, no stopping. Notes after.
- Marketing shots and headshots in costume

tracking.notes: Confirm flower + letter on SR props table
Hermia, Lysander, Demetrius brought before court
Theseus, Hippolyta, Egeus exit after ruling
Hermia & Lysander exit — plan to flee
Helena exits — decides to tell Demetrius
Quick shift — bench + throne off SR
Mechanicals enter — Bottom, Quince, Flute, Snout, Starveling

tracking.sceneLabel: ACT 2, SCENE 1 — A Wood Near Athens

tracking.what: fly out workshop / fly in forest
set forest ground row + fairy lights

tracking.notes: Oberon & Titania enter arguing (doubling: Avery as Oberon, Beatrice as Titania)
Demetrius & Helena enter — he pursued, she pursuing
Oberon exits with flower — will anoint Titania
Puck exits — sent to anoint Demetrius

tracking.sceneLabel: ACT 2, SCENE 2 — Another Part of the Wood

tracking.notes: Lysander & Hermia enter — lost and tired, lie down
Puck enters — sees Lysander, wrong Athenian!
Lysander wakes, sees Helena, falls in love

tracking.sceneLabel: ACT 3, SCENE 1 — The Wood. Titania Sleeping.

tracking.notes: Bottom exits into bush, returns with ass head
Quick change — donkey head to Harper in SR wing
Titania wakes, sees Bottom, falls in love
Titania leads Bottom off to bower

tracking.sceneLabel: ACT 3, SCENE 2 — Another Part of the Wood

tracking.notes: Demetrius & Hermia enter — ERROR: this is Demetrius & Helena! Puck's mistake revealed
Oberon anoints Demetrius — now both men love Helena
All four lovers exit in fog (Puck leads them astray)
Hazer at SL — timed with Puck's speeches

tracking.sceneLabel: ACT 4, SCENE 1 — The Wood. Lovers Asleep.

tracking.notes: Harper hands off donkey head SR wing
Four lovers wake, confused but paired correctly

tracking.what: fly out forest / fly in palace

tracking.notes: Bottom wakes alone — 'I have had a dream'
Bottom returns! 'Masters, I am to discourse wonders'

tracking.sceneLabel: ACT 5, SCENE 1 — Athens. The Palace. Wedding Night.

tracking.notes: Theseus & Hippolyta enter (Avery/Beatrice costume change from fairy royals)
Rest of mechanicals enter for Pyramus & Thisbe
Puck enters alone — 'If we shadows have offended'
Lighting cue: fairy lights dim during speech
Oberon & Titania enter for fairy blessing
